chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.5980 of 2014 Date Order with signature of Judge PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 31843/2014 -------------------------------------------------- 05.10.2016 Mr. Faizan Memon, Advocate Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG.. ------ 1-3 The matter was called in the morning when Mr. Malik Altaf Javed, Advocate for the petitioner, was not present, however, Mr. Faizan Memon, Advocate requested for time to call him. Now, after tea break, Mr. Faizan Memon Advocate submits that Mr. Malik Altaf Javed has instructed him to inform this Court that the petitioner does not want to press this Petition. In view of the statement of the learned counsel, this petition is disposed of accordingly along with the listed application. Interim orders are also vacated. Judge Judge Jamil
